claim_policy: No best-in-class claim is publishable without raw artifacts, validators, baseline versions, hardware metadata, and reproducible scripts.

suites.official_scope: International SAT Competition benchmark tracks for propositional satisfiability solvers.
suites.claim_target: Cost-normalized PAR-2 or time-to-valid-model on a named SAT Competition track.

suites.official_scope: Annual evaluation of state-of-the-art open-source MaxSAT solvers and heterogeneous benchmarks.
suites.claim_target: Best objective or best cost-normalized solved count on a named complete or incomplete track.

suites.official_scope: Canonical sample instances for TSP and related routing problems.
suites.claim_target: Best time-to-gap or cost-per-valid-tour on named TSPLIB subsets.

suites.official_scope: Implementation challenge designed for reproducible TSP heuristic comparisons, scalability, robustness, and normalized reporting.
baselines: Concorde where exact solve is feasible
suites.claim_target: Best scalability-adjusted tour quality on a named DIMACS TSP family.

suites.official_scope: OR-Library test data sets for multidimensional knapsack problems.
suites.claim_target: Best cost-normalized feasible objective or proof rate on named OR-Library MKP files.

suites.official_scope: Hard 0-1 knapsack instance families designed to expose weaknesses in standard benchmark sets.
suites.claim_target: Strong performance on hard families where standard small knapsack benchmarks are too easy.

suites.official_scope: Binary quadratic and Max-Cut instances for exact solution method testing.
suites.claim_target: Best cost-normalized time-to-best-known cut on named Biq Mac families.

suites.official_scope: Quadratic programming instance library containing discrete and continuous QP instances.
suites.claim_target: Best developer-accessible QP/MIQP result on a named QPLIB subset.

suites.official_scope: Standard mixed-integer programming library with a 240-instance benchmark set.
suites.claim_target: Credibility benchmark for general optimization; not the first place to claim Catalyst-Q advantage.

suites.official_scope: Quadratic assignment problem library with problem instances and best known solutions.
suites.claim_target: High-value proof point for assignment-structured optimization if Catalyst-Q wins time-to-good-enough.

suites.official_scope: Cost-normalized comparison against public cloud quantum and quantum-inspired access models where terms allow.
suites.claim_target: Lowest cost per validated solution for named optimization workloads.
